QueryForge
Start
No SQL knowledge required

Turn Natural Language
into SQL

Query your database using simple questions. QueryForge understands your schema and generates accurate SQL — no SQL knowledge required.

Start using app

Your data stays local — we never store your queries

Everything you need to query your data

No SQL knowledge required

Ask questions in plain English. QueryForge translates your questions into accurate SQL queries.

Works with your schema

Paste your database schema and QueryForge understands your tables, columns, and relationships.

Your keys, your data

Connect your own AI API keys. Your database credentials never leave your browser.

Instant results

Get SQL results immediately. Review before execution for complete control.

How it works

Step 01

Paste your schema

Copy your database schema (CREATE TABLE statements) and paste it into QueryForge.

Step 02

Ask in plain English

Type your question about your data using natural language.

Step 03

Get results instantly

Review the generated SQL, then execute with one click.

QueryForge — Query your database using natural language
